---
title: "ISL slide decks"
format:
  html: default
---

This section contains Quarto-revealjs slide decks adapted from the official PDF
slide decks at
[statlearning.com → resources for Python](https://www.statlearning.com/resources-python),
reproduced here with permission from the authors (James, Witten, Hastie,
Tibshirani).

Each chapter deck follows the **Python ↔ R tabset** pattern: every code example
appears side-by-side in Python (using the
[ISLP](https://islp.readthedocs.io/en/latest/) package) and R (using
[ISLR2](https://cran.r-project.org/package=ISLR2)), so readers can follow along
in either language.

## Available decks

| Chapter | Title | Formats |
|---------|-------|---------|
| 2 | Statistical Learning | [HTML](ch02-statistical-learning.qmd) · [Slides](ch02-statistical-learning-slides.html) |
| 3 | Linear Regression | [HTML](ch03-linear-regression.qmd) · [Slides](ch03-linear-regression-slides.html) |

*More chapters to follow.*

## Template

See [template.qmd](template.qmd) for the Python/R tabset pattern and
revealjs front matter that chapter decks follow.
